name: Red Hat Certified System Administrator (RHCSA)
description: Earned through hands-on labs covering storage (LVM), SELinux, systemd, networking with nmcli, NFS/autofs and shell scripting — see the Labs section for the work behind it.

name: Cisco Certified Network Associate (CCNA)
description: Routing & switching, IP services, security fundamentals and network automation basics.

name: Google IT Support Professional Certificate
description: IT support fundamentals — operating systems, troubleshooting, networking and system administration.

name: Cisco Certified Network Technician
description: Foundational skills for installing, operating and troubleshooting small enterprise networks.

name: Cisco Networking
description: Core networking concepts — addressing, protocols and device configuration.

name: Networking Devices and Initial Configuration
description: Initial setup and configuration of routers and switches in a small network.
